name: Scars of Mirrodin

draft.notes: Pack is 10 commons, 3 uncommons, a rare, an ad card, and a basic land. If a foil appears it follows the land, displacing a common. The ad/marketing card front face usually carries a token or tip.

sourceNotes: Large set. Printed in USA and Belgium. 36 packs per box. Booster has both a basic land and an ad card. Most marketing cards have a token or tip printed on the front face (token-on-ad-card), so the slot is recorded as adCard:true, token:false.
